min_entry_age.source_quote: Newborn baby ... Period and is aged up to 90 days. (Standard Care Classic entry: 91 days for dependent children)

max_entry_age.source_quote: Adult entry per Policy Schedule (Care Classic per CHI brochure: 5 years onwards / parents up to 99 years)

sum_insured_options.source_quote: Sum Insured options per Policy Schedule (Annual Health Check-up table references SI buckets <5L / 5-10L / >10L)

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 30-day waiting period - Code- Excl03 ... any illness within 30 days from the first policy commencement date

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Disease ... complications shall be excluded until the expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Specific Waiting Period: Code- Excl02 ... shall be excluded until the expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity & New Born Cover (Optional Benefit): ... Claims will not be admissible ... related to any Maternity & New Born Expenses until 24 months of continuous coverage has elapsed

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: period of 60 days immediately prior to the [in-patient admission]

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: period of 90 days immediately after the [discharge from Hospital]

day_care_treatments_count.source_quote: Day Care Treatment ... all Day Care Treatments (no fixed count enumerated in wording)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Day Care Centre means and includes Community Health Centre (CHC), Primary Health Centre (PHC) ... (AYUSH Treatment is a covered benefit)

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity & New Born Cover (Optional Benefit) — not part of base; available with 24-month waiting if opted

newborn_coverage.source_quote: Maternity & New Born Cover is Optional Benefit; newborn covered only if maternity option opted

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Cover listed under utilizable benefits for accrued NCB (covered for organ harvesting)

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: At the end of each Policy Year, the Company will enhance the Sum Insured by 25% flat, on a cumulative basis, as a No Claims Bonus ... shall not exceed 150% of the Sum Insured

restoration_benefit.value: Unlimited Automatic Recharge of base Sum Insured for same/different illnesses
restoration_benefit.source_quote: 3.1.5 Benefit : Unlimited Automatic Recharge ... Recharge shall be utilized only after the base [SI exhausted]

room_rent_capping.value: Per Policy Schedule (commonly Single Private AC room; subject to plan variant)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent ... as specified in the Policy Schedule (Care Classic plan grid)

copayment_pct.source_quote: Co-payment defined; applicability per Policy Schedule (typically 20% for entrants ≥61 years in Care Classic)

deductible_amount.source_quote: No base deductible in Care Classic

network_hospital_count.source_quote: Insurer-level metric; Care Health Insurance advertises 21,100+ network hospitals

claim_settlement_ratio.source_quote: Insurer-level metric (IRDAI Annual Report); not extracted

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: TAT governed by IRDAI Master Circular

policy_type.source_quote: Hospitalization Expenses ... indemnify the Insured Person ... (indemnity-based)

_meta.notes: Care Classic mid-tier indemnity. Maternity is optional add-on (24-month waiting). SI options + entry age caps per Policy Schedule.
